name: §6Ghoul
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Health: §c100
§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]
§7Intelligence: §b75
§7Vitality: §4[Vitality]
§7Mending: §a[Mending]

§6Undead Slayer
§7Gain §b1.5x §7Combat XP against
§aZombies§7.

§6Army of the Dead
§7Increases the amount of souls you
§7can store by §a2 §7and the chance of
§7getting a mob's soul by §a20%§7.

§6Reaper Soul
§7Reduces the summoning cost of mobs
§7by §a30% §7and increases their damage
§7output by §a20%§7. Increases the health
§7of all summoned mobs by §a100%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Ghoulfriend Ghoul Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aGhoul§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!

§5§lEPIC COSMETIC
